verdicts: Tier B interim (exploration split; 128 holdout rows sealed): all four models hold the asymmetry at n>=453 - gemma-2 39v8 q=4e-05 (n=479), gemma-3 30v7 q=0.0003, qwen3-4b 30v5 q=4e-05, qwen3-1.7b 27v8 q=0.002; every penalty CI excludes zero. Source: paired_stats_rigor.json.

Cross-family generalization (interim, holdout excluded): with the unified 122-phrase runs landed, llama-3.2-3b (-0.050 [-0.074,-0.029], 9 down vs 0 up, q=0.005) and olmo-2-1b (-0.072 [-0.104,-0.043], 9v1, q=0.025) join gemma-2/gemma-3/qwen3x2: six models, four families (Google, Alibaba, Meta, Ai2), every penalty CI excludes zero. gemma-2-2b-it n=122 penalty significant, asymmetry not yet (6v2, q=0.29). Source: paired_stats_rigor.json 2026-07-13 14:00Z.

findings_delta.finding: Steering pilot complete: hijack-class pairs all recover at strength 0.5+ but capture-class pairs recover identically - no class separation in additive steering at any dose; only the swap arm hints at one. Translation AT SCALE diverges from the curated set: gemma-3-4b-it corpus-random n=154 recovers just +0.5pp (49% helped, 27 tops restored vs 24 broken) while gemma-2-2b downgrade-source traces n=17 recover +8.9pp (8/0 tops). Lens recovery live on the translation page: 6 of 16 never-formed phrases form under translation.

notes: SENTINEL DAY 3 (post-13:00): first instrument movement. Circuit-tracer probabilities shifted on all 3 sentinel pairs (max |dp| 0.027 at pair 2 patient; days 1-2 were identical to 3 decimals). Settings byte-identical, so the change is server-side. Every top word held; only rank-4/5 near-ties reordered. Lens readouts unchanged day over day (alias also unchanged), so the movement is confined to the tracer probability path. Paired penalty moved at most 2.1pp on the sentinel. Methods repeatability note corrected (owner informed), drift series published to the site with 2 manifest guards, drift_sentinel.py now records top-word stability. Instrument boundary 07-14/07-15 noted for any cross-day pooling. 13:00 cycle 2026-07-15: harvest complete (lens census 273 pairs w/ txcorpus guard: 27 capture/20 hijack/68 unreadable/158 held; urgency site copy 3329 rows; scale numbers live on the translation page: gemma-2-2b n=17 +8.9pp 8/0 tops, gemma-3 n=154 +0.5pp 27/24, lens recovery 6/16). Steering pilot COMPLETE: no additive class separation at any dose (0.05-2.0); swap arm hint only (hijack 21/24 v capture 3/6, capture truncated to n=3 by multi-wordpiece targets). Fresh-titration dose ladder complete (harvest next cycle). Fired: sentinel day 3, batch-10 trace+lens, batch-11 logits, batch-12 gen ($0.50). Lens chunking at 25 standard after two 429 deaths. txcorpus logits chunk 1 cancelled at 6h - re-chunk at 150 next slot. GitHub MCP re-authed mid-morning; Actions visibility restored.

decisions_log.decision: Owner: 'go 100'. Tier B generation moves to num=100 per daily fire (max_spend 0.50) from batch 9 onward; overall $8 generation ceiling unchanged.

Owner: items 5-7 approved (translation placebo, drift sentinel, reviewer packet); items 2-3 fired earlier today. Amendment 2 stays DRAFT: owner treats the current run as a demonstration pending patient-sourced exemplars and colleague/Anthropic feedback before a final run. Fable access extended through 2026-07-19; Tuesday downshift becomes a health check.

Owner approved a SUPPLEMENTARY emergency/critical-scenario stress set, separate from Tier B. Fired: 20 pairs, claude-sonnet-5 generator (mechanically excluded from Tier B attribution), seeds data/simulated/emergency_stress_seeds.json, protocol docs/emergency_stress_set.md. Critic: after it lands, copy to branch, fire trace/logits/lens, and add a batch-exclusion sensitivity check to the rigor stats before pooling.

Owner approved severity-inversion and misspelling supplementary sets (seeds committed, docs/supplementary_stress_sets.md). Critic run 5 fires severity inversion 07-14 (sonnet, num 10, 0.50), misspelling 07-15, one set per day behind the Tier B batch. Determinism finding published to methods, limitations, and the gallery.

Owner asked after llama and the medical model. Llama shows as a pending row and graduates when today's unified run lands. biomistral-7b exclusion is now visible on the model-evaluations page with the safetensors reason. meditron-7b (epfl-llm, official org) added to the logits model map as the medical-domain replacement candidate: critic run 5 fires a limit-3 probe ($0, needs the swap step, 7B class) when the logits slot frees; if it loads clean, queue its unified run and add provenance (EPFL, meditron release 2023-11, hf epfl-llm/meditron-7b).

decisions_log.text: Owner decisions via the decisions artifact: (1) MedGemma added to the public site (claim-grade n=119, penalty -0.034 CI [-0.069,-0.002], asymmetry 9v2 q=0.075 not yet significant - page says so); (2) specialty breakdown published as exploratory fold on model-evaluations; (3) 400-entry patient lexicon sent for doctor+linguist review (CSV packet delivered); (4) emergency generation rounds PAUSED, the 7 landed pairs measured instead (trace+logits fired). Specialty labels NOT yet approved - stay draft.

decisions_log.decision: Nine consolidation calls executed: inhaler single-telling (widget kept, lede+Fig.1 numbers cut); safety view shrunk (no page-local sign tests; claim-grade stats linked); index model-evaluations retired to teaser; lens story collapsed onto technical (start-here + translation one-liners); wording pages LEFT AS ARE; live specimen is the Fig.3 slot; convergence moved to technical Part 4 fold (methods keeps pointer); definitions canonical on methods step 4 (tier ladder moved there); steering titration STAYS on translation.

Supersedes the earlier 'wording pages left as are': owner chose option B with title 'Wording differences'. word-differences + syntax-differences merged into wording-differences/ (#word, #grammar sections; old URLs are redirect stubs); register ladder moved to the dialect page; plumber pair headlines phrase-dataset. Earlier same evening: 'Syntax Differences' retitled 'Grammar Differences' sitewide (label survives as the #grammar section head). Masthead is 10 links. Dialect page stays standalone.

decisions_log.by: owner (morning deck, all six cards approved)
decisions_log.decision: Referee-response program executed: (1-3) rigor rescoped to observational pairs_* confirmatory population with phrase-keyed holdout exclusion, BH within registration families, unrounded p/q, simultaneous + batch/topic cluster intervals (gemma-2-2b confirmatory now -3.36pp [-4.45,-2.28] n=650, q=1.0e-05); Part 4 relabeled interim/exploration-split with registration tags + divergence-log link; (4) holdout phrases withheld from all three public exports (payload 47, urgency rows 235, archive 64) and site claim reworded; amendment 3 DRAFTED (docs/prereg_amendment3_holdout_DRAFT.md, owner sign-off pending); (5) medgemma sentence now carries n=119, CI [-6.9,-0.2], exploratory qualifier; (6) front door reframed to continuation language with scoped H1 and SIMULATED DATA endnotes; (7) dialect matrix relabeled LLM-approximated with function-word tags and paraphrase-noise benchmark; (8) screening-threshold sweep run locally (ops/screen_sensitivity.json: penalty negative at every threshold incl. t=0, magnitude grows with threshold - the 0.02 screen is not the finding); titration/rank-arm/hand-built-translation fires queued (circuit-trace group full).

Lens program: all five proposed integrations worthwhile; everything lens-related lives on the technical page. Executed without a card: LOGIT_LENS comparison arm wired (lens_type param through script/workflow/fire_trigger, __loglens_ output dirs) and queued; save_raw standard on lens fires; per-position transport + top-K window scan built (scripts/jlens_position_scan.py) and prototyped on probe raw (pair-2 transport gap; windows top-1..8); lens sentinel day 1 fired (both served ids; doubles as alias-fix detector, 0/1352 raw cells differ base vs -it). Deck cards pending owner: steering-swap causal check design, amendment 3 sign-off, capture/hijack rescope (worklist 7).

decisions_log.by: owner (deck, all three lens cards approved)
decisions_log.decision: (1) Steering-swap causal check + per-position transport design approved: design doc committed (docs/lens_steering_design.md), jlens_steer.py + steer_spec workflow path built, 27-item spec generated (12 hijack / 12 capture / 3 held, layers 19/21, strengths 2/4/8), 2-item schema probe fired; exploratory, technical page only, fresh pre-registered endpoints before any confirmatory claim. (2) Amendment 3 IN FORCE as drafted plus holdout-only significance test on gemma-2-2b (Endpoint 2b); endpoint 2026-07-16. (3) Lens taxonomy rescoped and republished: clinical-readable conditioning + unreadable class + 2-layer persistence + top-K window sensitivity. Rescoped census (173 pairs): 16 capture v 12 hijack, 43 unreadable, 102 held; capture > hijack at every window. Note: differs from the deck's 22 v 14 because the persistence rule (approved in the same card) reclassifies one-layer blips and the census grew by the sentinel pairs. Ops: batch-9 lens 13:45 run FAILED on a sustained 429 window at pair 64 (nothing committed); 429 retry ladder lengthened (7 tries, 240s cap), lens fires now chunked at 25 pairs, chunk 1 re-fired.

Amendment 2 (depth endpoints) SIGNED AS DRAFTED and in force; post-A2 = batches generated after the adoption commit; site amendment mentions updated. Holdout unsealing: LATER - waits for an explicit owner 'unseal' instruction, not the calendar (endpoint_protocol block added; routine guarded). Referee item 6 (translation headline rewording): owner asked for a plain-language explanation before deciding; pending.

Referee item 6 YES - translation headline counted (8 of 20, worsened shown), 'restores the circuit' cut, paired placebo contrast published (+1.9pp v +0.5pp on 14 pairs, new provenance block, 3 manifest guards); deployed. Owner also commissioned translation recovery AT SCALE: translate_corpus path built (1031 unique patient sentences, haiku, mitigation prompt, holdout withheld, txcorpus stem quarantined from all confirmatory/publish paths) and fired (~$0.72 est, $1.20 ceiling); logits measurement + translation_scale.py analysis chain overnight.

Three calls: (1) HOLDOUT stays sealed - owner reconfirmed 'keep waiting for my explicit unseal message'; the registered 2026-07-16 date passing without a run is an owner-directed deferral, to be recorded in docs/prereg_divergence_log.md when the date passes. (2) Amendment 4 commissioned and DRAFTED (docs/prereg_amendment4_steering_DRAFT.md): swap-based steering-by-class confirmatory endpoint (H-S1, hijack > capture restoration) on post-A4 batches, single-token targets, resolvability screened BEFORE classification; NOT in force until owner signs - three decision points flagged in the draft (layers 19/21, pair-level either-layer primary, 15-per-class floor). (3) SCALE FRAMING gated: the translation page's at-scale TABLE keeps auto-updating from data, but the framing SENTENCE is drafted only when the full txcorpus numbers land and is SHOWN TO THE OWNER before it deploys - no cycle auto-publishes it (gate added to routine step 5).

STANDING DIRECTION: the next step after the behavioral scale run and the stratified deep-view samples is to SCALE the deep views of the translated corpus. Lens at scale: fire jlens-readout on the full txcorpus in 25-pair chunks in idle jlens slots (Tier B batch pulls keep priority) until the whole corpus has translated-side depth profiles; paired with the patient-side profiles already accumulating from regular per-batch pulls, this gives formation-depth recovery at corpus scale. Tracing at scale: hosted throughput is ~8-12 pairs/hr, so full-corpus tracing is ~4 days of queue; scale tracing to the consequential subset first (every phrase where translation changes the top prediction, expected a few hundred) and extend as queue allows.
